text: People are discussing about the limitation of human contact due to the use of technology had positive or negative effect on people's live. For example, technology allows people to complete tasks without having contact with others. Other people think that technology will have limited. However, technology it is not important because distract many people from real world and cause a big effect in teenager young. Technology can distract many people from the real world. For example, my brother he is a good student, he have great grade, he had a excellent person he always complete his homework, but when he being use your phone, video games, computer, he lost interest in his High School today he always used his phone, when he have homework he just use the computer for find information, but before he read books, or in his book notes for find a better information, but now he prefer use the computer or his cell phone that looking in books, he almost always leave with his friends to have a time to fun or do others thinks like when they having homework they go to the library and looking for a books to find information about their homework, in his High School he can learn much but he never put attention because he always pass playing video games, today he not have friends, he not talk with nobody because he prefer technology that get out with his friends . However,my mom talk with him about this problem and she just said that the High School it is important to him for his education and also she said that he lost self-interest. It is important have limited when we use technology like cell phone or computer, technology lost many young people. For example, when I use my cell phone my mom always put me time, she always tell me that I need time for do my homework, but she let me use my cell phone for 50 mines, and after 50 mines I need do all my homework, that for me is a good solution for no lost time with the technology, also when I have homework, usually I use a books and try to find more information about my homework, some young people lost time playing video games, or use social count like Facebook, Instagram, or other things, because their parents not put attention to young people, young prefer playing that do their homework, have limited to use technology is a good way for worry about we self-interest and have time for learning other important things, today young people not worry about their own education or their own learning it is more important to use technology, when young have homework they prefer use technology like computer or in their cell phone, the correct will be go to the library and try to find a books to bring information. Technology will be limitation in all society of this way we are helping to private of many things like accidents and young people can learn more. When a person it's driving and use the cell phone can cause a accident, when young people have a homework they can learn more if they read a books for fin better and important information. Other people think technology it is important for find better information.

As being the youngest child, I have gained wisdom from many different people, such as my family,my friends, and my teacher's, this has helped me to be a better person in life and grow as a person. Someone who has shared wisdom with me is my Family, they have told me to ""Try to learn from my mistakes and move on'', because failure can lead to success, all you have to do is try avoiding all the mistakes you have done in the past. My family members also have told me to to be respectful to everyone and everything because you should treat others how you want to be treated. Getting experience from my family members is very important because they can persuade me to make big choices about my future which is very important. I'am very grateful for my family because they have helped me make the correct choice in my life because of their wisdom the have shared with me. Many of my friends have shared wisdom with me, they tell me that I should me be nice to everyone and not bully or harass other people, because you dont know what other people are going through in their life. They have also said that you should not treat people different because of there race or their religion. All my friends make mistakes but they are nice enough to tell to to avoid doing the wrong thing. My friends are really helpful because they share there experience with me and that helps me a lot. My teachers have also shared with me really important wisdom, one of my teachers Generic_Name tells me that I should make good habits like studying very day, finishing my homework,and being respectful to others, because when I go to high school those habits will help me out in the long run. Teacher's have also told me to take school more seriously, because what I do in high school can effect me for the rest of my life. Many other teacher's have shared with me their experience in their life and tell me what I should do to avoid their failures. Most teachers are very wise and have a lot of wisdom which they have shared with me which I'am grateful for. Getting wisdom from other people is very important because and can help grow because it is very important that I try to learn from others failure attempt and try to avoid doing the same thing wrong. Wisdom is very important because it helps everyone and can change peoples lives.

I think people could do one of both if they need help they can get it . In the past I thought people made their own decisions. Some people make through decisions on their own, because If people made their decisions and that people might not relay own experts although some people may say It helps when you have a another opinion from someone. I think people should talk to a expert because they can have a second opinion. To begin with If people seek guidance from experts, for example If someone wanted to move to another state and they can't decide they could get advice from a expert, lastly If people are abused or hurt from someone. If you have been hurt in your home one your family members you can talk to the authorities not an expert because the authorities can remove the abuser and after you can talk to a expert and you ask your expert on how to make descions on my own. If people don't get help there might be serve consequences subside or they might hurt someone else. To begin with if you tell an expert you probably have to pay money, for example the expert might not support you all the way, lastly, you have not feel better if you talked to a stranger I think people could do one of both if they need help they can get it, thereforeyou can get all the help you want you can always try that you can the desicons on your own and you have someone there to help people.

The success is depends on your attitude Yes, the positive attitude is the key to success in life. A lot of people have ever fallen down on the road to the success, because they don't have a heart fill of positive attitude. Who could easily succeed before doesn't experiences any sorrows and failures? Who also could be a successful person without experiencing plenty of pains? We should know the road connect to success is overlapping and difficult, no short cut to go for everyone, so what will we need best is a heart that face to dangers correctly and a positive attitude to overcome difficulties. Common people do not have any courages to face to difficulties, and they stop, run away and even go to bad when something bad happens, that's why they are vulgar. A famous painter from Italy once suffered lots of pains with drawing so much eggs, he liked to Said :""why my teacher always wanted me to drew the damn egg"" before he became the almost most famous artist around the world. At that time He was really pessimistic and complained: I have already drew actually many paintings of eggs, I really didn't understand why I should need to do those until I improved my level of drawing from the ""small'' egg. I just still drew the common egg seriously like drawing other complex works, From now on, It is not only a common ""small"" egg for me, but also the egg which gives me repaies from many sides about learning and understunding what the true art was? , these is no easy way to gain the success, but people who have positive attitudes will never give up to steel themselives, and face a new challenge and then success is necessay for them. Once I was afraid of speaking English, Maybe is my problem of the pronounction, so I have been practicing my pronountion everyday after that, I do speak English loudly, and then never fear it later, I just wana make everybody hears my voices of speaking and the song of singing, This is what is known as positive attitude to face to failture. Of course, the success is certainly important , but please don't forget your life was still affected by the process of gaining success. Except for recruiting experiences from your failures, Are they most important happiness and your life's gains for yourself when you are chasing to your success? This proves that has a positive attitude is so important for the success and your life. The people who has a positive attitude could never lacks the success, so what are you going to do now? Don't fear to Gain the success or losing hope and losing anything? Hey! Cheer up and stand up! Because the success is there.

To be somebody in a world that would make someone else can be a great accomplishment if they willing to put in the work or effort into it. What's that make a great a accomplishment is the mind set, the goals, success, and motivation. The mind set is the first thing to be somebody in a world to make a great accomplishment is that they must have a good reputation, credentials, and status. They must have a great dream that they could pursue in their lives that could come true. They must stay on track to be the successful person in society. However, the mind set or goal should never forget on what they are pursuing in. The accomplishments they could have done would most likely to succeed. They might able to get a high paying job in society, they could have their reputation status increase, or being in public media. On the contrary, these successful people that could accomplish any task in the workforce or in the society the lived in. The motivation they have. Everyday, these civilized people get motivated everyday to be themselves to be the most successful person in the world. In society, motivation is the key to become somebody in a world with a good reputation. However, individuals sometimes don't get motivated they sometimes lose track on what they are doing. To be a somebody could make them be successful if they could follow these ideas to be in this successful path they are walking in.
